user_query: How long has Caroline had her current group of friends for?
full_query: READ(/Root/Conversation_Version[1]/ Speaker[atom(content =~ "Caroline")]/Session[atom(content =~ "friends group duration")]/Observation[atom(content =~ "current group of friends") ])
xpath_query: /Root/Conversation_Version[1]/ Speaker[atom(content =~ "Caroline")]/Session[atom(content =~ "friends group duration")]/Observation[atom(content =~ "current group of friends") ]
